subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Hearken unto that which My Pen summoneth thee to from within My prison, for verily it summoneth thee unto none other than God, thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی فاسمعی ما یدعوک به قلمی فی سجنی و انه  یدعوک  الا الی الله ربک
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
